examples: In the research of primary spectrum pyrometry, this paper discussed the definition problem of radiation temperature measurement area based on the measurement coordinates.
Experiment on acoustic pyrometry is done using the chirp signal, white noise and sine wave respectively in a 300MW boiler in one domestic power plant, through fire hole on furnace wall.
This thesis based on high temperature measurement and optical fiber sensor technology, take a study of ordinary multimode fiber optical fiber and sapphire colorimetry pyrometry technique.
